rationale: Anti-gaming byte-preserved: round-2 delta is exactly 3 files, all internal/complete/; tally.go+gate.go NOT in `git diff ce9f5395 7de2c459` and the panel suite (AC3/AC4a-b/AC7/AC8/AC10/AC12 case-sensitivity/ApprovesExcludes) is all-green — those guarantees are untouched. Every-matched-panel discharge strictness is SOUND: dischargeVerified requires dischargeEvidence in EVERY re-tallied matched panel and vetoes on any error/zero-panel/slot-absent → the direction is fail-closed, so it can only Refuse (recoverable), never lose an audit. It does NOT wrongly block normal completion: a single matched panel that resolves the slot still discharges (verified: CrossPanel Run-2 discharges+writes refutation_discharged once the origin slot flips to APPROVE across all matched panels). No NEW anti-gaming hole: adding a decoy all-APPROVE panel adds a conjunctive requirement, making discharge STRICTLY HARDER — the origin panel still showing the RC live vetoes discharge, so a decoy cannot force one. Gate and reconcile share gateRoots + identical panel.ForBead(panelScanFn(roots...)) seam → matched sets cannot diverge. Empirical: build/gofmt/vet clean; full+`-race` green; mutation (first-panel-only discharge) → CrossPanel RED.
findings: Byte-preservation confirmed: `git diff --name-only ce9f5395 7de2c459` = complete.go, panel_advisory.go, panel_refuted_test.go only; tally.go/gate.go absent → AC3/AC4b/AC7/AC8/AC9/AC10/AC12 logic unchanged. `go test ./internal/panel -run 'Refut|Round|Dup|PanelGateDecision'` PASS (ok 0.278s).

Strictness soundness: dischargeVerified(slot,round) returns false unless retallyOK AND dischargeEvidence holds for every result; dischargeEvidence treats slot-absent-at-round and RC-present as non-confirming. This is fail-closed — Refuse (guard.NewFailure, recoverable) is the only cost; a pending obligation is never dropped. Never loses an audit.

No block of legitimate single-panel completion: one matched panel resolving the slot → dischargeVerified over one result true → Discharge; and Satisfy (this-run applied) fires before the discharge check regardless of re-tally. CrossPanel Run-2 proves recovery: origin resolves → discharge + refutation_discharged=true + entry names X@1.

No new decoy-panel hole: all-panel conjunction means an added all-APPROVE decoy only ADDS a condition; the origin panel still showing the live RC keeps dischargeEvidence(origin)=false → Refuse. Decoys make discharge harder, not easier, and any discharge still writes a durable refutation_discharged audit (invariant: audit never lost).

Matched-set consistency: complete.Run computes gateRoots once; panelGate (L172) and reconcile (L664) both scan via identical panel.ForBead(panelScanFn(roots...), beadID); panel.Scan is pure fs → the two cannot diverge on the matched set.

Fixes #2/#3: covered-of-record no-op reads panel_refuted_entries + refutation_discharged_entries fail-closed (decode error → Refuse); (slot,round)-exact covered map; all three decode helpers now (entries,error) with absent→(nil,nil) no-op, present-but-corrupt→error→Refuse. New tests AlreadyCoveredPending (both coverage kinds + non-covered control) and MalformedPendingEntries (3 subcases) PASS.

Mutation probe: reverting dischargeVerified to first-panel-only (dischargeEvidence(results[0],...)) → TestPanelRefuted_CrossPanel_NoFalseDischarge FAIL ('run 1 must REFUSE ... false discharge') — the load-bearing fix is genuinely pinned.

Empirical in /tmp archive @7de2c459: go build ./... exit 0; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet clean; go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead ./cmd/mindspec all ok; go test -race panel/complete/bead all ok. Shared worktree left clean (all work in /tmp).
